content.text: The project uses `upToNextMajorVersion` from `1.0.0`, so the version constraint already allows 1.0.4. I just need to resolve the package to pick up the new version.

content.text: AudioCaptureKit is now resolving to **1.0.4**. Let me also update the origin hash in Package.resolved since Xcode may have updated it.

The `originHash` will be regenerated by Xcode on next resolve — the important part is that the revision and version are correct and Xcode already confirmed it resolves to 1.0.4.

Done. Updated `Package.resolved` to pin AudioCaptureKit to **v1.0.4** (`7e1b1ac`). The `upToNextMajorVersion` constraint in the project file didn't need changing since it already allows `1.0.x`.
